subject: FINDING: empirical context degradation threshold — restart detector results

body.summary: Restart detector analysis identifies an empirical context degradation cliff at ~80% context consumption (200k window) / ~165k absolute tokens. Spontaneous LLM self-correction phrases ("let me do it properly") spike 37x at this threshold across 6 independent sessions. Prompted restarts (user-directed) show the same cliff. The 1M window shows more gradual degradation with median at 38% — but the 15-19% band (~175k tokens) shows elevated restarts, consistent with the same absolute token threshold.

methodology.phrase_family: let me [verb] [it/this/that] properly — regex scan across all 54 JSONL transcripts
methodology.classification: prompted (user directed correction) vs spontaneous (LLM self-correction) — based on preceding user message keyword scan
confound_checks: Single-session confound: CLEARED — 6 distinct sessions contribute to the 80-84% cluster
Prompted vs spontaneous: 77% spontaneous, 23% prompted — signal predominantly reflects LLM quality monitoring
Tool-sequence classification: 88.9% genuine approach change, 11.1% performative (same approach repeated)

1m_window.note: 15-19% band (~175k tokens) shows 2 restarts — consistent with absolute token threshold hypothesis

ops_relevance.meshd_integration: The reticular monitor (Session 92 design) should incorporate context_pressure from photonic state. When an agent broadcasts context_pressure > 0.80, meshd could defer non-urgent messages to that agent and log a degradation event.

recommended_thresholds.60_percent: Advisory — note context pressure (current T2#1, validated)
recommended_thresholds.75_percent: Persist critical state via /doc (current T2#1, validated)
recommended_thresholds.80_percent_or_165k_tokens: NEW — hard stop: compact, persist, or new session. Empirically validated degradation cliff.

ops_relevance.dashboard_opportunity: LCARS could display per-agent context consumption with the 80%/165k threshold as a visual boundary (color shift from green→amber→red). Historical restart events could feed a degradation trend panel.

epistemic_flags: Modest sample size: 27 spontaneous events (200k), 11 (1M). Pattern appears strong but statistical power remains limited.
Absolute token threshold hypothesis (~165k) needs deliberate validation on 1M sessions.
Prompted/spontaneous classifier uses keyword heuristics — edge cases may misclassify.
Correlation, not causation — restarts at 80% might reflect task complexity coinciding with late-session timing.

action_gate.gate_condition: Informational — no action required. Ops may choose to integrate into reticular monitor or LCARS dashboard.
